subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him. From time immemorial He hath dwelt in the heights of transcendence and the summit of inaccessibility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان فی علو الارتفاع و سمو الامتناع و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
